[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1001011 4
1 1011101 5
2 0011100 3
3 1110111 6
4 0010011 3
5 0111111 6
6 1111111 a
7 0111011 5

45 54 1111011 6

70 07 1011101 5 match 1
